name: Publication Output Pie — Raw Numbers Conversion
input: Create a pie chart showing our department's publication output by type for 2024. We published: 42 original research articles, 15 review articles, 8 meta-analyses, 12 case reports, 5 editorials/commentaries, 3 book chapters, and 2 technical reports. Title: 'Department Publication Output by Type (2024)'. Show each category with its count.
qualityCriteria: Title present containing Publication or Department
All 7 publication types present as slices
Original research articles slice is the largest
Numeric values present for each slice
Valid Mermaid syntax that parses without errors
napkinBenchmark: Pie chart with 7 slices, publication types with raw counts, proper title.
